booking.cookieNoticePrefix: This site uses essential cookies to operate. By booking, your data is processed according to our

hero.titleLine2: and grow — all in one place
hero.subtitle: Your barbershop with its own page, online booking, Stripe payments, and German legal compliance — ready in minutes, in 3 languages.

features.title: Everything your barbershop needs
features.subtitle: One complete platform — no spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, or disconnected tools.
features.multiTenantBody: Every barbershop gets its own subdomain with white-label booking — no watermarks, no multi-tenant confusion.
features.bookingBody: Customers pick a service, staff member, and time slot in real time — no calls, no back-and-forth messages.
features.paymentsBody: Deposit, full prepayment, or pay-on-site — you choose the rule per service.
features.teamBody: Invite managers, professionals, and receptionists with role-based access.
features.securityBody: Two-factor authentication and fail-closed data isolation between tenants.
features.complianceBody: Impressum, DPA, and data export/erasure — ready to operate in Germany.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: 14 days free, card required but no charge.
howItWorks.step2Body: Add your team, services, and working hours.
howItWorks.step3Body: Share your booking page and start taking reservations.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card for the free trial?
faq.a1: Yes, but you won't be charged during the 14-day trial. Cancel anytime before it ends.
faq.a2: Yes, directly from the billing dashboard, no penalty or minimum commitment.
faq.a3: Yes. Data isolation between barbershops, two-factor authentication, and GDPR compliance, including data export and erasure on request.
faq.a4: Yes, via Stripe: deposit, full prepayment, or pay-on-site, configurable per service.
faq.q5: Does it work in other languages?
faq.a5: Yes, the dashboard and booking page are available in German, English, and Portuguese.

finalCta.title: Ready to modernize your barbershop?
finalCta.subtitle: Get started now — 14 days free, no commitment.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.noOrgBody: Your account isn't linked to any barbershop yet.
